business.name: Ramps and Rails CO
business.tagline: Skater owned. Skater built. Locally made.
business.shortDescription: Custom skate ramps designed, built, and delivered out of Boulder, Colorado. Brand new, made-to-order ramps for all abilities — fractions of the cost of name brands.
business.longDescription: Ramps and Rails CO is a skater-owned shop in Boulder, Colorado building custom wooden skate ramps and rails. Every ramp is built locally, made to order, and designed to last. From beginner-friendly launch ramps and quarter pipes to full backyard mini ramps, spines, and one-of-a-kind multi-purpose obstacles — if you can dream it, we can build it.
valueProps: Fractions of the cost of name brands
Custom builds for any size or shape

products.name: R&R Kicker (Launch Ramp)
products.description: One of the most popular skate ramps out there. Endless trick possibilities — launch, kick, flip, slide. Available in multiple heights and widths, with premade ones on hand or shipped to your door as an R&R Kit.

products.name: Everyday Quarter Pipe
products.description: Why invest in a ramp that's too big to learn on, too heavy to move, and similar to one at any skatepark? Our QPs are sized for home use — easy to learn on, easy to move, fun for all levels.
products.notes: Other heights available on request. Add angled steel to the deck for a 3-in-1 combo (QP + launch + grind ledge).

products.name: Fun Box Combo
products.tagline: They wouldn't call it a fun box if it wasn't, well... FUN!
products.description: 2-in-1 combo: launch ramp/kicker plus ledge. Flip tricks, grinds, slides, spins, drops — all possible with just these two ramps. Sold individually or as a discounted combo.

products.name: Manual Pad
products.tagline: If we had to pick one obstacle for the rest of our lives — this would be it.
products.description: Custom-built manual pads. Low, long, wide, double-grindable sides — you dream it, we build it.

products.name: Mini Ramp / Half Pipe
products.tagline: A miniramp a day keeps the doctor away.
products.description: Backyard mini ramps and half pipes — fully custom builds, on-site construction available.

products.name: Spine Ramp
products.tagline: Spines are hard to skate — and build. Let us worry about the construction.
products.description: Custom spine ramps built to spec. Full transitions, both sides, ready to session.

products.name: The Mullet
products.tagline: Business up front, party in the back.
products.description: Multi-purpose ramp combining different features in a single obstacle. The first in our multi-purpose series.

products.name: 3-in-1 Butter Bench
products.tagline: Three different features in one obstacle. Possibilities are endless.
products.description: Combination obstacle with three skateable features in one piece. Featured in a May promotional giveaway.

products.name: Slacurail (Slap Curb Rail)
products.description: Slap-curb-rail hybrid. Curb on one side, rail on the other — slappies, grinds, and slides in one obstacle.

products.name: Free Fingerboard Ramp
products.tagline: When it rains and you can't skate, we've got your fingerboard needs covered.
products.description: Free fingerboard ramp included with any full-size ramp purchase.

products.name: Custom Builds
products.tagline: If you build it... they will skate it.
products.description: Quarter pipes, spines, banked hips — pretty much anything you can dream up. DM with what you're interested in and we'll help you out.

products.name: On-Site Backyard Builds
products.tagline: Get your summer set up before it's too late.
products.description: We come to you. Full backyard build-outs — mini ramps, half pipes, complete setups installed on your property.

products.name: Garage Setup
products.tagline: What's your dream garage set up?
products.description: Every skater's dream. Full custom indoor/garage skate setups designed to your space and budget.

addOns.name: Caster Wheels (Mobility Upgrade)
addOns.description: Add caster wheels to almost any ramp — game changer for moving and storing. Easy for one person to roll a ramp that would otherwise need 2+.

addOns.name: Bolted Steel Transitions
addOns.description: Metal transitions are key to any wooden skate ramp — and the first thing to fall off on cheaper brands. Ours are bolted on to last, and removable with just a skate tool.

addOns.name: Hand Holds
addOns.description: Every ramp comes with built-in hand holds for easy carrying. Don't break yourself before the session even starts.

addOns.name: Weather Protection
addOns.description: Seal, stain, or paint upgrades to protect your investment from the elements. Wood and weather don't mix — we make sure your ramp lasts.

addOns.name: Assembled Delivery
addOns.description: Delivered to your door, fully assembled. No hex keys, no 80-page instructions, no weekend lost to assembly.

whyUs.title: Skater-built
whyUs.body: Every ramp is designed and built by skaters who actually skate. We know what feels good and what doesn't.

whyUs.title: Locally made
whyUs.body: Every ramp is manufactured here in Colorado — not flat-packed from overseas.

whyUs.title: Built to last
whyUs.body: Bolted steel transitions, quality plywood, weather-protection options. Designed for years of sessions.

whyUs.title: Fair pricing
whyUs.body: Quarter pipes start at $200. Fractions of the cost of name brands. No middlemen, no markup.

whyUs.title: Made to order
whyUs.body: Tell us your space, your style, your budget — we'll build something that fits.

whyUs.title: All abilities
whyUs.body: From a kid's first launch ramp to backyard half pipes for advanced skaters.

audiences.name: Parents
audiences.hook: Help keep your kids off screens and outside with smiles on their faces.
audiences.context: Affordable, kid-sized ramps for at-home setups. Same-day order and delivery available.

audiences.name: Backyard skaters
audiences.hook: Get your summer setup before it's too late.
audiences.context: Mini ramps, half pipes, and on-site backyard builds.

audiences.name: Skate parks / programs
audiences.hook: Custom builds, multi-obstacle setups, durable construction.
audiences.context: Bulk and program pricing available — DM for quotes.

audiences.name: Apartment / garage skaters
audiences.context: Caster-wheel add-ons, low-profile QPs, fun boxes — designed for tight spaces.

calloutQuotes: Skater owner, skater built. Local and custom.
If you build it... they will skate it.
You dream it, we can build it.
Don't WEDGE yourself into a skateless day.
A miniramp a day keeps the doctor away.

faqs.a: Yes — order our R&R Kit and we deliver to your door. Local Colorado deliveries can come fully assembled.
Yes. Most of our standard ramps come in multiple heights and widths, and we'll build custom dimensions on request.

faqs.q: Can you build at my house?
faqs.a: Yes. We do on-site backyard builds — mini ramps, half pipes, and complete setups.

faqs.q: What's the cheapest ramp you offer?
faqs.a: Our small Everyday Quarter Pipes start at $200. Fun Box combos start at $200 as well.

faqs.q: How is your ramp better than a used one online?
faqs.a: Brand new. Skater designed and built. Locally made. Fractions of the cost of name brands. Delivered assembled. Multiple upgrades available.

faqs.q: Do your ramps hold up outside?
faqs.a: With our seal, stain, or paint upgrades — yes. Wood and weather don't mix, so we recommend at least sealing if your ramp lives outdoors.

designNotes.vibe: Bold, gritty, skate-shop authentic. Not corporate. Hand-built energy.

typography.suggested: Heavy condensed sans for headings (e.g., Bebas Neue, Anton, Oswald). Clean grotesk for body (Inter, Manrope, or system sans).

designNotes.tone: Punchy, playful, full of skate puns ('LAUNCH out of your seat', 'get a KICK(er)', 'WEDGE yourself'). Don't sand off the personality.

images.note: 37 product photos extracted from the @ramps_and_rails_co Instagram. Paths are relative to content.json. All images are 1080px wide (mostly portrait or square).
